faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Find answers to the most common questions about our services and processes
faq.ctaText: Still have questions? Our team is ready to help.

items.question: What kind of processes do you automate?
items.answer: We automate any repetitive manual workflow: invoicing, reports, approvals, system integrations, notifications, data processing, client onboarding, and more. If your team does it manually and repeatedly, we can probably automate it.

items.question: Do I need technical knowledge to work with you?
items.answer: No. Our process starts with a comprehensive assessment where we map your current workflows in business language. You explain what you need, and we handle all the technical work.

items.question: Do all automations use artificial intelligence?
items.answer: Not necessarily. Many processes are automated with integrations, APIs and business rules — without AI. We use artificial intelligence only when it adds real value, such as document analysis, data classification or intelligent customer service.

items.question: How long does it take to implement an automation?
items.answer: It depends on complexity. Simple automations can be ready in 2 to 4 weeks. More complex projects with multiple integrations take 2 to 3 months. We always provide a clear timeline before starting.

items.question: How does post-delivery support work?
items.answer: We offer ongoing support and monitoring of automations in production. If your process changes, we adjust the solution. Our plans include preventive maintenance and system evolution.

meta.title: Custom Automation | Lecabe
meta.description: We build tailored automations to eliminate manual processes and accelerate your operations.

hero.title: Eliminate manual processes with custom automation
hero.subtitle: We transform repetitive workflows into automated systems that save time, reduce errors and free your team to focus on what truly matters.

metrics.title: Results from our automations
metrics.subtitle: Real impact on our clients' operations

overview.title: Automation that adapts to your business
overview.content: Your company has unique processes — and deserves unique solutions. We don't use generic tools. We analyze your workflows, identify what can be automated and build systems that fit perfectly into your operations. From invoicing to onboarding, from reports to approvals: if it's manual and repetitive, we automate it.

web.title: Web Systems
web.description: Complete web platforms to manage and monitor your automations from anywhere, with secure real-time access.

mobile.title: Mobile Apps
mobile.description: Apps for your team to track automated processes from their phones, with notifications and approvals at their fingertips.

api.title: APIs & Integrations
api.description: We connect your existing systems — ERPs, CRMs, spreadsheets, emails — so data flows automatically between them.

database.title: Data Processing
database.description: Automations for data collection, transformation and consolidation that used to be done manually in spreadsheets.

integration.title: Automated Workflows
integration.description: Workflows that execute automatically: approvals, notifications, status updates and escalation.

discovery.title: Process Assessment
discovery.description: We map your current workflows, identify bottlenecks and calculate the time and cost that automation can save.

design.title: Solution Architecture
design.description: We design the ideal automation: which systems to connect, what rules to apply and how the team will interact with the new workflow.

development.title: Development & Testing
development.description: We build the solution with frequent check-ins. You follow every step and test before going to production.

complete.name: Full Automation
complete.description: For companies that want to automate multiple processes in an integrated way.

q1.question: How long does it take to automate a process?
q1.answer: Simple automations take 2 to 4 weeks. More complex projects with multiple integrations take 2 to 3 months. We provide a detailed timeline after the assessment.

q2.question: Does it work with the systems I already use?
q2.answer: Yes. We integrate with any system that has an API or data export capability: ERPs, CRMs, Google Sheets, legacy systems, emails and more.

q3.question: What if my process changes later?
q3.answer: Our automations are designed to be flexible. We adjust rules, workflows and integrations as your business evolves, without rebuilding from scratch.

q4.question: Do I own the code?
q4.answer: Yes. All developed code is 100% yours. We deliver the repository, documentation and full access to the infrastructure.

cta.title: Ready to eliminate manual processes?
cta.description: Schedule a free assessment. We'll map your workflows and show you what can be automated.
cta.whatsappMessage: Hi! I'm interested in custom automation. I'd like to schedule a free assessment.

meta.title: Infrastructure & Integration | Lecabe
meta.description: We connect your systems and build cloud infrastructure for your automations to run securely and at scale.

hero.title: Your systems connected in an infrastructure that scales
hero.subtitle: We integrate ERPs, CRMs, APIs and everyday tools so your data flows automatically — with security, monitoring and high availability.

metrics.title: Infrastructure that connects everything
metrics.subtitle: Integrated systems running securely and at scale

overview.title: Integration and infrastructure for automations
overview.content: Many companies operate with systems that don't talk to each other: the ERP doesn't connect with the CRM, reports are built manually and data is trapped in spreadsheets. We fix that by connecting your systems and hosting your automations in the cloud simply and reliably.

infrastructure.title: Hosting & Deploy
infrastructure.description: We set up and maintain your cloud environment (AWS, Vercel) so your automations run with stability and controlled costs.

monitoring.title: Monitoring
monitoring.description: Automatic alerts and simple dashboards to track the health of your automations and integrations.

automation.title: System Integrations
automation.description: We connect APIs and systems so data flows between your tools without manual intervention — ERPs, CRMs, spreadsheets and more.

security.title: Basic Security
security.description: Security best practices: backups, access control and protection of your clients' data.

assessment.title: System Mapping
assessment.description: We audit your current infrastructure, identify siloed systems and integration opportunities.

architecture.title: Integration Architecture
architecture.description: We design how your systems will connect: APIs, queues, webhooks and data flows.

migration.title: Implementation & Migration
migration.description: We execute integrations and migrations incrementally, with zero downtime for your operations.

optimization.title: Optimization
optimization.description: We fine-tune performance, costs and scalability so everything runs efficiently.

support.title: Monitoring & Support
support.description: We monitor integration health 24/7 and act proactively before any issues arise.

techStack.title: Infrastructure technologies
techStack.description: Tools we use to host and integrate systems

migration.name: Single Integration
migration.description: Connect specific systems or migrate to the cloud.

managed.name: Managed Infrastructure
managed.description: We take care of your infrastructure so you can focus on your business.

q1.question: Which cloud provider do you use?
q1.answer: We mainly work with AWS and Vercel. We recommend the best fit for each case, considering cost and project requirements.

q2.question: Will the migration stop my operations?
q2.answer: No. We perform incremental migrations with zero downtime. Your old system continues running throughout the transition, with guaranteed rollback in case of any issues.

q3.question: How much can I save by migrating to the cloud?
q3.answer: On average, our clients reduce infrastructure costs by 30% to 50% through resource optimization, auto-scaling and elimination of idle servers.

q4.question: Do you integrate with legacy systems?
q4.answer: Yes. We have experience with legacy systems, on-premise ERPs, proprietary databases and tools that don't have modern APIs. We create custom integration layers.

cta.title: Your systems need to communicate better?
cta.description: Let's map your integrations and build a plan to connect your entire operation.
cta.whatsappMessage: Hi! I'm interested in cloud integration and infrastructure. I'd like to request a free mapping.

metrics.title: Interfaces your team actually adopts

overview.title: Design focused on operations
overview.content: An automation only generates value if people can use it. We design interfaces built for those who operate day to day: dashboards with the right metrics, panels that facilitate decision-making and tools that integrate naturally into the team's routine. No unnecessary complexity.

research.title: User Research
research.description: We interview and observe your team to understand how they work, where they get stuck and what they need to see to make better decisions.

prototyping.title: Rapid Prototyping
prototyping.description: We create interactive prototypes that your team can test before a single line of code is written.

testing.title: Usability Testing
testing.description: We validate every interface with real users to ensure it's intuitive and efficient in practice.

design-system.title: Design System
design-system.description: We build a consistent component system that ensures visual quality and development speed.

accessibility.title: Accessibility
accessibility.description: Interfaces accessible to all user profiles, following WCAG standards.

research.title: Understanding
research.description: We map who will use it, what they need to see and what decisions the interface should facilitate.

wireframe.title: Structure
wireframe.description: We define the information architecture and navigation flows before visual design.

prototype.title: Prototyping
prototype.description: We create navigable prototypes for validation with stakeholders and end users.

testing.title: Validation
testing.description: We test with real users and iterate based on collected feedback.

handoff.title: Dev Handoff
handoff.description: We deliver organized files with detailed specifications for implementation.

techStack.title: Design tools
techStack.description: Tools we use to prototype and validate interfaces

audit.name: UX Audit
audit.description: Complete evaluation of current interfaces with improvement recommendations.

redesign.name: Interface Design
redesign.description: Complete dashboard and interface design for your automations.

q1.question: Do I need design if I already have a working system?
q1.answer: If your team complains about the interface, takes long to find information or makes operational errors, yes. Good design reduces errors, speeds up work and increases tool adoption.

q2.question: How long does an interface project take?
q2.answer: An audit takes 2 to 3 weeks. A complete interface project with research and prototyping takes 4 to 8 weeks depending on complexity.

q3.question: Do you test with real users?
q3.answer: Always. We test every interface with the real users who will operate it daily. It's the best way to ensure it works in practice, not just in Figma.

q4.question: Does the design work on mobile too?
q4.answer: Yes. We design responsive interfaces that work on desktop, tablet and mobile. For field operations, we also develop native mobile apps.

cta.title: Your team deserves interfaces that work
cta.description: Let's evaluate your current tools and design interfaces your team will love using.
cta.whatsappMessage: Hi! I'm interested in interface design and dashboards. I'd like to request a UX audit.

meta.title: AI Consulting | Lecabe
meta.description: We analyze your operations and implement artificial intelligence where it truly makes a difference.

hero.title: Artificial intelligence applied to your business
hero.subtitle: We don't sell AI as a trend. We analyze your operations, identify where artificial intelligence generates real impact and implement solutions that demonstrably reduce costs and increase efficiency.

metrics.title: AI that generates real returns
metrics.subtitle: Proven results from AI consulting and implementation

overview.title: AI that solves real problems
overview.content: Many companies want to use AI but don't know where to start — or have tried and didn't see results. Our consulting starts from your business problem, not the technology. We identify where AI makes sense, where simple automation works, and where it's not worth the investment. We only implement what generates returns.

automation.title: AI-Powered Automation
automation.description: We use AI to automate decisions and processes that previously required manual analysis — classification, triage, data extraction and more.

nlp.title: Text Processing
nlp.description: Automated analysis of documents, emails and feedback. We extract and organize information from text using language models.

chatbots.title: Chatbots & Assistants
chatbots.description: Smart chatbots that serve customers, answer questions and perform simple tasks — integrated with WhatsApp, websites or internal systems.

discovery.title: Opportunity Assessment
discovery.description: We analyze your operations to identify where AI can generate the most value and prioritize by business impact.

data.title: Data Evaluation
data.description: We verify if your data is sufficient and high-quality enough to train models. If not, we help structure it.

modeling.title: Proof of Concept
modeling.description: We develop a quick MVP to validate technical feasibility and return potential before a larger investment.

validation.title: Implementation
validation.description: We scale the validated solution to production, with performance monitoring and automated retraining.

deploy.title: Continuous Optimization
deploy.description: We track results, adjust models and expand to new use cases as they emerge.

techStack.title: AI technologies
techStack.description: Tools we use to implement AI solutions

poc.name: Assessment & POC
poc.description: Complete evaluation + proof of concept to validate an AI opportunity.

implementation.name: Implementation
implementation.description: Complete development of a production-ready AI solution.

q1.question: Does my company need a lot of data to use AI?
q1.answer: It depends on the case. Some models need large volumes of data, but there are AI solutions that work with little data or use pre-trained models. In the initial consultation, we evaluate feasibility with the data you have.

q2.question: Is AI too expensive for my company?
q2.answer: Not necessarily. The initial assessment identifies high-impact, low-cost opportunities. Many solutions use existing AI APIs without training models from scratch. Investment always starts from a clear ROI.

q3.question: How do I know if AI will work for my case?
q3.answer: That's exactly what the POC (proof of concept) phase is for. We test technical feasibility with your real data before any larger investment. If it doesn't work, you don't spend more.

q4.question: What's the difference between automation and AI?
q4.answer: Automation follows fixed rules (if X, then Y). AI learns patterns and makes decisions based on data. Often the best solution combines both. In consulting, we define what makes most sense for each process.

cta.title: Discover where AI makes sense in your business
cta.description: Schedule a free consultation. We'll analyze your operations and show the AI opportunities with the highest return potential.
cta.whatsappMessage: Hi! I'm interested in AI consulting. I'd like to schedule a conversation about applying artificial intelligence to my business.

hero.title: About Lecabe
hero.subtitle: From software developers to automation specialists: our journey is guided by results.

story.title: Our Story
story.content:
Lecabe was born in 2019 from the frustration of seeing companies spend hours on processes that could be automated in minutes. We started as a software development company and, over the years, realized that the greatest value we delivered wasn't code — it was time back for our clients.

Today we are specialists in process automation and AI consulting. We help companies of all sizes identify what can be automated, implement tailored solutions and reap measurable results.

Our differentiator is simple: we don't sell technology for the sake of it. We start from the business problem, understand the operation and only then propose the right solution — whether it's a simple integration or an artificial intelligence model.

excellence.title: Results first
excellence.description: Every solution we deliver must generate measurable impact. If it doesn't save time, money or reduce errors, we don't do it.

transparency.title: Total transparency
transparency.description: No unnecessary technical jargon. We communicate clearly what we're doing, why and how much it costs.

partnership.title: True partnership
partnership.description: We work as an extension of your team. Your success is our success.

innovation.title: Intentional simplicity
innovation.description: The best solution is the simplest one that solves the problem. We avoid over-engineering.

impact.title: Real impact
impact.description: We focus on automations that make a difference in daily operations, not showcase projects.

quality.title: Continuous evolution
quality.description: We keep up with new technologies to always bring the best solution for each problem.

understanding.title: Understand before proposing
understanding.description: We invest time understanding your real operations before suggesting any technical solution.

collaboration.title: Close collaboration
collaboration.description: Frequent check-ins and open communication at every project stage.

delivery.title: Impactful delivery
delivery.description: Every delivery solves a real problem and generates immediate value for your operations.

support.title: Support that evolves

intro.title: What it's like to work at Lecabe
intro.content:
At Lecabe, we believe that people motivated by real impact do the best work. Our environment is remote-first, collaborative and results-focused — not hours worked.

We value autonomy, continuous learning and direct communication. Everyone on the team has an active voice in decisions and visibility into the impact of their work.

learning.description: Individual budget for courses, certifications and conferences. Learning is part of the job.

autonomy.title: Autonomy with accountability
autonomy.description: We trust you to manage your time and deliver quality results.

balance.title: Real balance
balance.description: Flexible hours, remote work and respect for your personal time.

diversity.title: Diversity
diversity.description: Diverse teams solve problems better. We seek people from different backgrounds and perspectives.

transparency.title: Transparency
transparency.description: Open numbers, shared decisions and constant feedback.

impact.title: Impact focus
impact.description: We measure success by the value we deliver to clients, not by lines of code.

testimonials.quote: What I love most about Lecabe is seeing the direct impact of my work. When I automate a process that saves hours for an entire team, the motivation is on another level.

testimonials.quote: The autonomy and trust I receive here allow me to do the best work of my career. And the best part: from home, at my own pace.
